top_signals.summary: AI-driven growth and 'America-first' policies are pulling global capital to the U.S., challenging India's appeal as the fastest-growing economy.

top_signals.title: 79 ELDs revoked since January. 12 more just hit the list.
top_signals.summary:
FMCSA removed 12 more electronic logging devices from the registry today, bringing the total to 79 revocations since January 2025. The registered list is bleeding devices faster than the market is adding them. At this rate, the agency may be building a de facto third-party certification standard without ever formally adopting one.

The post 79 ELDs revoked since January. 12 more just hit the list. appeared first on FreightWaves.
